## TRM1.5. Vertical flight efficiency of the climb (PI#8)

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (34.8 seconds per flight), average times flown level during climb are on average 45.9 seconds per flight higher in France. The highest average time flown level during climb happens at Lille Airport (LFQQ) (361.3 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Paris Charles de Gaulle (LFPG) (33.7 seconds per flight).
